nodes.name: Buller's shearwater
nodes.summary: Buller's shearwater（Buller's shearwater，学名 Ardenna bulleri），分类上属于鹱形目，并归入鹱科，在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要分布于堪察加半島、波利尼西亚三角，常见栖息地包括峡谷峭壁。

nodes.name: 堪察加半島
nodes.summary: 堪察加半島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括赤颈鸊鷉、普通海鸥、Buller's shearwater等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 鹱科
nodes.summary: 鹱科（Procellariidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联74种鸟类，如南极鹱、Pintado petrel、Southern giant petrel等74种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鹱形目
nodes.summary: 鹱形目（Procellariiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联115种鸟类，如加岛信天翁、短尾信天翁、Northern royal albatross等115种鸟类。

nodes.name: 波利尼西亚三角
nodes.summary: 波利尼西亚三角是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Buller's shearwater，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 峡谷峭壁
nodes.summary: 大型猛禽和食腐鸟偏好的高崖栖息环境。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Though it occurs in the subarctic waters off Kamchatka and the Aleutian Islands, it is not documented in the subantarctic Pacific; this apparent absence might simply be due to the lack of study opportunities in the vast islandless region south of the Polynesian Triangle, however

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Though it occurs in the subarctic waters off Kamchatka and the Aleutian Islands, it is not documented in the subantarctic Pacific; this apparent absence might simply be due to the lack of study opportunities in the vast islandless region south of the Polynesian Triangle, however

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: | title = Handbook of Australian, New Zealand and Antarctic birds | publisher = Oxford University Press (Melbourne and New York) | year = 1990 | isbn = 0-19-553068-3 }} Buller's shearwater can also be found to breed in cracked-up rock on treeless stacks or cliffs, however, and most of the other colonies – on the smaller Poor Knights islands between the main islands and off the southeast of Aorangi – are of such a nature
